end,function(e)O[e]=O[e]-(-636076+636077)if 725698-725698==O[e]then O[e],G[e]=nil,nil end end,function(e,Q)local a=V(Q)local t=function(...)return A(e,{...},Q,a)end return t end,function(e,Q)local
